ddt:Target.Name: IC907_420_BR420_High_X6_R6_00.06.01.ddt
ddt:Target.Description: Note: A formal request/response parameter xx, yy, zz,... is only relevant, if its data have a formal specification within the same chapter.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG

Data.Name: Hands Free Parking Default Maneuver FactDef
Symbol Text brake warning (Symbol Or Text)
Number of rear seats (Rear Seat Layout)
Belt warning sound (Belt Warning Sound inactive)
Distance over TCO (var ODO over tachograph)
Time from TCO (var Time synch tachograph)

Item.Text: IC is not programmed/buzzers except function
IC is programmed/buzzers ready for use

Data.Name: Wakeup for Exterior Light (Wakeup ExtLgt Avl)
Current consumption (TC CurCons per hour Avl)
Engine oil level display (Engine Oil Level Menu)
Oil level workshop (Engine Oil Level Garage)
Display remaining distance (TC Range Disp Avl)
Warning driving position R engaged (Rueckw Warn)

Item.Text: no menue, no Display of particle filter load
force ECU to regenrate and Display particle filter load

Data.Name: Ext Signal Charge Power (ChrgPwr ext avl)
End of Charge time (EOC Time Avl)
EV CH2 system state (SysFail AltDrv Avl)

Item.Text: MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: Deactivate Belt warning tone and engine hood warning Start
ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: Deactivate Belt warning tone and engine hood warning Stop
Deactivate Belt warning tone and engine hood warning Results

DataItem.Name: Hands Free Parking Default Maneuver FactDef
Symbol Text brake warning (Symbol Or Text)
Number of rear seats (Rear Seat Layout)
Belt warning sound (Belt Warning Sound inactive)

End of Charge time (EOC Time Avl)
EV CH2 system state (SysFail AltDrv Avl)

DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Software Logical Block Part Number(s) Read

DataRead.Maintenance data record part 3 ASSYST PLUS dataset Read
DataRead.Basic parameter ASSYST PLUS dataset Read

DataWrite.Maintenance data record part 3 ASSYST PLUS dataset Write

Test.Description: The preheating telltale has malfunction. (component internal failure)
The protection of the battery discharge is activated (no sub type information).
The protection of the battery discharge is activated. A invalid signal is present (signal invalid).
Initial startup was not performed.
The service memory in the maintenance program is full. (not configured).
The maintenance program data are unknown (not configured).
The maintenance program data are implausible (not configured).
Der ASSYST-PLUS basic parameter was not coded (not configured)
The event memory has malfunction. (Component or system operation obstructed or blocked)
The telltale 'ESP' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The telltale 'ESP OFF' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The telltale 'ABS' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The yellow telltale 'Service brake' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The red telltale 'Service brake' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The telltale 'SRS' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The display 'driving position' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The yellow telltale 'Parking brake' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The red telltale 'Parking brake' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The telltale 'Direction Indicator Left' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The telltale 'Direction Indicator Right' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The telltale 'Electic System' has malfunction (component internal failure).
The voltage supply in the system is too low (signal below allowable range).
The voltage supply in the system is too high (signal above allowable range).
The voltage supply is too low (circuit voltage below threshold).
The voltage supply is too high (circuit voltage above threshold).
An internal error in the instrument cluster is available. There is an internal component failure.
The driving authorization data are implausible (the component is not activated).
The driving authorization data are implausible (a wrong or incomplete configuration was detected) (ISO/SAE reserved).
The value of the total distance is implausible (signal invalid).
The value of the total distance is implausible (signal compare failure).
The value of the total distance is implausible (signal plausibility failure).
The value of the total distance is implausible (missing message).
The communication with the user interface CAN-Bus has malfunction (Bus Off).
The communication with the ECU 'Combustion engine' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Transmission' has malfunction (signal plausibility failure).
The communication with the ECU 'Transmission' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Fuel pump' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Powertrain' has malfunction (signal plausibility failure).
The communication with the ECU 'Powertrain' has malfunction. (missing message)
The communication with the ECU 'Traction Control Unit' has malfunction (signal plausibility failure).
The communication with the ECU 'Traction Control Unit' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the tire pressure monitoring has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Power steering' has malfunction (signal invalid).
The communication with the ECU 'Power steering' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the signal detect and control unit front has malfunction (signal plausibility failure).
The communication with the signal detect and control unit front has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the signal detect and control unit rear has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the multifunctional ECU has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Audio or COMAND' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the Supplemental Restraint System (SRS) has malfunction (signal plausibility failure).
The communication with the Supplemental Restraint System (SRS) has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Weight Sensing System' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the PARKTRONIC has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the air conditioning system has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the electronic ignition switch has malfunction (signal plausibility failure).
The communication with the electronic ignition switch has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Tachograph' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Rear door left' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Rear door right' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Front door left' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Front door right' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the column tube unit has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the trailer-connection-unit has malfunction (signal plausibility failure).
The communication with the trailer-connection-unit has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU fro telematics services has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Radar sensor' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the blind-spot-assistant has malfunction (missing message).
